_meta.source_note: Parsed from a user-provided text export of Archives of Nethys background listings.
notes: Some entries in the provided text were truncated with an ellipsis character and are preserved as-is.
A few entries in the provided text omitted fields such as PFS availability, granted feats, or summaries; those fields are null or empty arrays here.
Duplicate background names from the source text were preserved with suffixed slugs.
